very.e: I was very excited for my birthday party.

video.d: A recording of moving pictures and sounds
video.e: I like watching funny videos on my tablet.

view.d: The way something looks from a certain place
view.e: I can see the park from the view out of my bedroom window.

value.d: How much something is worth or important
value.e: My family values honesty and kindness.

various.e: The club has activities for various interests like sports and art.

version.d: A certain form or type of something.
version.e: This is the latest version of the game.

voice.d: The sound a person makes when they speak.
voice.e: The teacher's voice was loud and clear.

vote.d: To choose someone or something by casting a ballot
vote.e: I get to vote for my class president.

visit.d: To go see someone or something
visit.e: I visit my grandparents every weekend

via.d: Using a particular way or method
via.e: I sent the package to my friend via the postal service.

violence.d: Harmful or dangerous behavior that can hurt people.
violence.e: We should always try to solve problems without violence.

village.d: A small town or community in the countryside
village.e: The village has a small school and a few shops.

van.d: A big car used to carry lots of things
van.e: We drove the van to the store to buy a new couch.

views.d: What you can see from a place
views.e: The views from the top of the mountain were amazing.

variety.d: Many different types or kinds of something
variety.e: The store has a variety of toys to choose from.

values.d: The beliefs and ideas that are important to someone
values.e: Honesty and kindness are values that I try to have.

volume.d: How loud or quiet something is
volume.e: The volume on the TV is too loud, please turn it down.

vs.d: A short way to say 'versus' or 'against'
vs.e: My team is playing the other team vs in the big game.

victory.e: The team celebrated their victory after the big game.

vehicle.d: Something that can take you from one place to another
vehicle.e: My family drove to the park in our car, which is a vehicle.

valley.d: A low area between hills or mountains
valley.e: We hiked down into the green valley.

vice.d: A bad habit or behavior that is hard to stop.
vice.e: Smoking is a common vice that many people struggle with.

victims.d: People who have been hurt or suffered from something bad.
victims.e: The families of the victims were very sad.

videos.d: Short films or shows that you can watch on a screen
videos.e: I like to watch funny videos on my tablet.

vision.d: The way you see things in your mind or with your eyes.
vision.e: I had a vision of a beautiful garden in my head.

votes.d: When you choose something by raising your hand or writing it down.
votes.e: The class voted on their favorite book to read.

victim.d: A person who has been hurt or harmed
victim.e: The car accident left the victim injured.

voting.d: The process of choosing something by ballot
voting.e: Voting for class president is important.

vehicles.d: Vehicles are machines that can transport people or things, like cars or trucks.
vehicles.e: My family drives our car, which is a vehicle, to the grocery store.

visited.d: to go to a place and spend time there
visited.e: My family visited the zoo last weekend.

vast.e: The desert was a vast open space.

violent.e: The storm had violent winds that knocked down trees.

visual.e: The artist created a beautiful visual display of paintings.

voted.d: chose by ballot or show of hands
voted.e: The class voted on their favorite book to read.

visitors.d: People who come to a place to look around
visitors.e: The museum had many visitors today.

valuable.d: Something that is very useful or important
valuable.e: The diamond ring was a valuable family heirloom.

virginia.d: A state in the eastern United States
virginia.e: My family went on vacation to Virginia last summer.
